hook: A household OS that catches the soccer pickup conflict before either parent realizes there's one.
core_problem: 44M dual-income US households juggle 12-20 weekly logistics events; existing apps (Cozi, Skylight) are calendars, not brains.
ai_leverage: Calendar + intent agent reads emails/texts; planner agent resolves conflicts + assigns roles; communication agent confirms with each parent.

moat_potential.rationale: Family workflows + history lock; switching means rebuilding.

scalability_rationale: Software + email integration; community + B2B2C channels.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: dual-income households. Stage 2: full family operations + finances. Stage 3: AI family ops bundled with insurance + benefits.
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own intent + planning engines, not a calendar UI
commoditization_collapse: family-graph integration moat
validation_invocation: Per-family intent data is asymmetric; calendar apps see only events.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-family routines, calendar history, conflict outcomes.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Parent approves any external coordination (e.g., scheduling with another family).

ui_ux_invocation: Parent says 'Tuesday's broken'; agent reshuffles + texts the other parent.

hook: A family copilot that turns 7 school portals into one Sunday-night digest with the week's homework + permission slips.
core_problem: 55M US K-12 families navigate Schoology, Canvas, ClassDojo, Seesaw, etc.; consolidated visibility doesn't exist.
ai_leverage: Portal-aggregation agent ingests per-school feeds; planner agent renders unified weekly view; reminder agent texts the right parent.
monetization_logic: $9/mo per family + school district enterprise tier.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C families. Stage 2: district-wide. Stage 3: full K-12 family OS.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: FERPA + COPPA + state student privacy
thin_wrapper_syndrome: own integrations + planning
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for K-12 family + school; both win.

technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: School district approves data integration; parent approves any external sharing.

ui_ux_invocation: Parent receives Sunday-night digest + daily reminders.

hook: A meal-planning brain that handles celiac sister, peanut allergy nephew, vegan mom — and still gets dinner on the table by 6.
core_problem: 30% of US households have multiple dietary restrictions; existing meal planners (Plan to Eat) ignore allergens.
ai_leverage: Diet + allergen agent intersects family profiles; recipe agent generates compliant meals; grocery agent orders via Instacart.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-family allergen-safe recipe corpus is unique.

scalability_rationale: Software + grocery API; community channel scales.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C families. Stage 2: full grocery + meal kit. Stage 3: nutrition + insurance bundle.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: FDA allergen labeling alignment
thin_wrapper_syndrome: own dietary intersection engine
validation_invocation: Per-family dietary intersection data is asymmetric; recipe sites are generic.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-family dietary profiles, recipe corpus, grocery history.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Dietitian advisor reviews any new allergen protocol.

ui_ux_invocation: Parent says 'plan this week's dinners'; agent returns + orders groceries.

hook: A childcare marketplace where every sitter passes background + activity verification — and the price reflects it.
core_problem: 30M US working parents face childcare crisis; Care.com + Sittercity are listings + variable trust; safety incidents persist.
ai_leverage: Background + reference verification agent; matching agent picks sitter for child + activity needs; monitoring agent ensures check-in/check-out.
retention_loop: Per-family trust corpus + sitter relationships lock.
scalability_rationale: Per-metro cold-start; B2B benefits channel accelerates.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: hourly sitters. Stage 2: nanny + tutor. Stage 3: full childcare + tutoring + insurance OS.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: state background check + worker classification
unsustainable_unit_economics: marketplace + insurance keep margin healthy
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for working parents + sitters; both sides win.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Python + Postgres + Stripe Connect + Checkr
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-family preferences, sitter history, safety corpus.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Trust + safety reviews incidents; ops verifies sitters.

ui_ux_invocation: Parent books with one tap; agent handles verification + monitoring.

hook: A chore + allowance OS that teaches kids financial literacy by making earning real.
core_problem: 60M US households with kids 6-16; existing apps (Greenlight, GoHenry) are debit cards, not earning systems.
ai_leverage: Chore-verification agent (photo + parent approval); financial coaching agent teaches saving + investing.
monetization_logic: $10-20/mo per family + interchange on debit card.
retention_loop: Per-kid balance + history compounds; switching loses earned trust.

moat_potential.rationale: Kid financial history is account-locked; family preference moves slow.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C families. Stage 2: school partnership + financial literacy curriculum. Stage 3: full youth-financial-OS.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: COPPA + state minor banking + UTMA
fake_ai_trap: parent approves every chore + payout
validation_invocation: Defensible parent-trust brand + interchange + subscription combo.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Node + Postgres + Galileo + Plaid
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-kid chore corpus, financial behavior, parent rules.
technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + RDS; PCI + COPPA + state minor banking compliance.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Parent approves every chore + payout; bank partner reviews any large transaction.

ui_ux_invocation: Kid uploads chore photo; parent approves; agent pays.

hook: A screen-time brain that swaps Roblox for the right educational app — without the kid noticing.
core_problem: 70M US kids spend 4-7 hrs/day on screens; existing parental controls (Apple, Google Family Link) are blocking, not steering.
ai_leverage: Usage-pattern agent classifies content; substitution agent suggests next app + game; reward agent rewards learning.
retention_loop: Per-kid usage corpus + parent rules lock.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-kid behavior + outcome corpus is unique.

scalability_rationale: Mobile + community scale fast; partnership channel.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C families. Stage 2: school + EdTech bundle. Stage 3: full youth-content-OS.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: COPPA + state youth digital protection
thin_wrapper_syndrome: own substitution algorithm
validation_invocation: Per-kid behavior corpus is asymmetric; OS-level controls see only screen time.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Python + Postgres + Apple ScreenTime API
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-kid usage patterns, content metadata, learning outcomes.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Parent approves every new app whitelist; ed advisor reviews content.

ui_ux_invocation: Kid opens iPad; agent suggests the next thing; parent sees weekly digest.

hook: A pediatric navigator that books well-visits + specialists + insurance auths in one shot.
core_problem: 55M US kids face fragmented pediatric care; parents lose 10+ hrs/yr to insurance + scheduling friction.
ai_leverage: Records-aggregation agent ingests EHR; scheduling agent books across providers; insurance agent submits prior auths.
retention_loop: Per-child + per-family records compound; insurance + provider lock.
scalability_rationale: Healthcare cycle slow; once integrated, expansion fast.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C families. Stage 2: pediatric care + insurance bundle. Stage 3: full pediatric care navigation OS.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: HIPAA + state pediatric care + COPPA
fake_ai_trap: clinical reviewer for any insurance dispute
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for families + pediatric care + insurance.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Python + Postgres + EHR API + Availity
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-child records, provider schedules, insurance plans.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Clinical reviewer for any prior auth dispute; parent approves data sharing.

ui_ux_invocation: Parent says 'time for well-visits + flu shots'; agent books all three providers.

hook: A household inventory that auto-orders the toilet paper before you ask 'who used the last roll'.
core_problem: 60M US families run out of basics weekly; existing solutions (Amazon Subscribe & Save) are fixed-cadence not consumption-aware.
ai_leverage: Voice + receipt + camera agent tracks inventory; reorder agent times Amazon/Instacart based on consumption.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: basics + cleaning. Stage 2: full household-supply autopilot. Stage 3: bundled with grocery + delivery.
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own consumption corpus
unsustainable_unit_economics: subscription + affiliate
validation_invocation: Per-household consumption data is asymmetric; retailers see baskets, we see velocity.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Python + Postgres + Amazon Affiliate + Instacart API
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: User approves reorder >$50; ops handles disputes.

ui_ux_invocation: Family says 'we used the last paper towels'; agent reorders + updates list.

hook: A grandparent connection coach that bridges the digital divide so the kids actually call.
core_problem: 60M US grandparents underconnect with grandkids; tech friction + scheduling kills calls; existing FaceTime is utility, not relationship.
ai_leverage: Activity agent suggests games + topics by kid age; connection agent schedules + facilitates calls.
distribution_strategy: Senior community + Medicare Advantage + family channel.
retention_loop: Per-family connection history + activity corpus lock.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-family + per-kid age engagement corpus is unique.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C families. Stage 2: bundled with elder + family insurance. Stage 3: full intergenerational connection OS.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: COPPA + senior accessibility
thin_wrapper_syndrome: own engagement model
validation_invocation: Per-family + per-kid engagement data is asymmetric.
ui_ux_invocation: Grandparent presses one button; agent prompts a kid-appropriate game; call begins.

hook: An everyday legal-docs vault that handles permission slips, sports waivers, and 504 plans without the chaos.
core_problem: 55M US K-12 families sign 50+ docs/yr; signatures lost; deadlines missed; no central record.
ai_leverage: Document-classification agent ingests school + activity docs; signing agent routes for parent e-signature; storage agent retains records.
monetization_logic: $5-9/mo per family + school district enterprise tier.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: K-12. Stage 2: full family-document OS. Stage 3: bundled with insurance + estate.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: FERPA + COPPA + state minor consent
thin_wrapper_syndrome: own document classification + routing
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for K-12 families + districts; both win.

technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Parent signs every legally binding document; school approves data integration.

ui_ux_invocation: Parent sees one signing reminder per day; documents auto-filed.
